experience.title: Staff Software Engineer
base_bullets: Owned the payments reconciliation pipeline processing $400M+ annually with 99.99% uptime targets and PCI-aligned controls.
Led a team of five engineers through cloud migration from on-prem .NET monolith to containerized services on AWS.
Established engineering standards for observability, on-call playbooks, and blameless postmortems across three product squads.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
base_bullets: Shipped customer-facing analytics dashboards used by 50k+ weekly active users with role-based access and export tooling.
Reduced P1 incidents by 40% year over year by introducing SLOs, synthetic checks, and runbook automation.
